expected_detections.name: VM/Virtualization Detection
expected_detections.description: Code attempts to detect virtual machine environments and exits to evade sandbox analysis
indicators: MAC address prefix checking for VM vendors
Checking for hypervisor and container indicators

expected_detections.name: Browser Credential Theft
expected_detections.description: Underlying payload steals Chrome browser login credentials
indicators: Accessing Chrome Login Data SQLite database

notes: VM detection is commonly used by malware to avoid analysis sandboxes. Security researchers typically analyze malware in VMs.
